## Goal

What does "done" look like? One paragraph.

## Why

Motivation, evidence, source. No marketing.

## Scope

What's in. What's out.

## Acceptance

Concrete, observable criteria for closing this epic.

## Out of scope

Things explicitly deferred — link to follow-up issues if any.
